_comment: Bundler3 multicall(Call[]) real-tx corpus (Ethereum mainnet, chain 1) — Etherscan, isError=0. emit.strategy=multicall_call_array decodes each Call leg PER-LEG-TO (each Call.to a different contract) into its installed manifest -> ActionBody::Multicall. Demonstrates: morpho_blue legs via GeneralAdapter1, a Permit2 leg via the Permit2 manifest (different to), and GeneralAdapter1 funding/plumbing legs (erc20Transfer / permit2TransferFrom) now COVERED as token/erc20_transfer (D-B) — the bundle's token-IN and leftover-sweep legs are legible. market_id is keccak-derived from $args.marketParams; a 0x..f sweep amount = max-uint 'sweep all'.

transactions.intent: bundler3 multicall: morphoWithdrawCollateral (wstETH collateral, USDC market) + erc20Transfer (wstETH sweep-all to user, now COVERED) -> Multicall[withdraw, erc20_transfer]

bundler3 multicall: Permit2 permit (leg->Permit2) + permit2TransferFrom (WBTC user->GA1, now COVERED) + morphoSupplyCollateral (WBTC collateral, leg->GeneralAdapter1) + erc20Transfer (WBTC sweep-all to user, now COVERED) -> Multicall[permit2_sign_allowance, erc20_transfer, supply, erc20_transfer]

bundler3 leverage: top-level morphoSupplyCollateral + morphoFlashLoan whose reenter(Call[]) callback (D-C) borrows USDT against the supplied collateral and re-supplies — the borrow leg has NO top-level source, proving the nested callback was decoded. Direct-Morpho (0x8069218f) + Paraswap swap (0xf75584ef, $fn gap) legs are correctly skipped.

bundler3 Lido deleverage: morphoWithdrawCollateral (wstETH) + unwrapStEth (wstETH→stETH, D-D liquid_staking/unwrap) + erc20Transfer sweeps. The unwrap leg was a DEFERRED staking plumbing leg — now covered.
